title: IicpTask
description: IICP task submission message (Phase 1 wire format). See spec/iicp-core.md §3.

task_id.description: UUID v4 unique identifier for this task. MUST be globally unique per CALL.

intent.description: Intent URN identifying the task type. Format: urn:iicp:intent:<domain>:<action>:v<N>.

payload.description: Opaque task payload. Structure is intent-specific. MUST NOT be logged by intermediaries.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds. Provider MUST abort task if exceeded.

region.description: Optional preferred region for execution (e.g. eu-central).

trace_id.description: Distributed trace identifier. Propagated as X-IICP-Trace-Id.

origin_node.description: node_id of the originating proxy or node.

node_token.description: Bearer token issued at node registration. Phase 1: static token. Phase 2+: JWT.

max_credits.description: Maximum credits the sender authorises for this task. Phase 3+ only.

priority.description: Premium tasks get priority queue placement. Phase 3+ only.

billing.description: Optional billing constraints. Ignored in Phase 1.
